# Prime Fleet Care

> Prime Fleet Care is Perth, Western Australia's specialist **mobile truck wash and fleet cleaning** service. We come to your depot, wash on your fleet's schedule, recollect all dirty water, and use eco-friendly products — keeping trucks road-ready with zero downtime and no wash bay required.

## Why fleet operators choose Prime Fleet Care
- **Fully mobile** — we bring water tanks, pressure washers and all equipment to your yard. You never move a truck or need a wash bay.
- **Works around your fleet's schedule** — early-morning starts, late-night finishes and weekends, so washing never disrupts your runs.
- **Dirty water recollection** — all washwater is captured and responsibly disposed of. Zero stormwater runoff, keeping your depot environmentally compliant.
- **Eco-friendly products** — biodegradable cleaning chemicals that are tough on diesel soot, grease and road grime but safe for the environment.
- **Reliable and consistent** — operators consistently rate us 5/5 for showing up on time and delivering clean trucks every single visit.

## Services
- Exterior truck wash (cab, body, trailer)
- Full exterior truck detailing and ceramic paint sealant
- Engine and radiator degreasing
- Underbody / undercarriage cleaning
- Interior cab cleaning, vacuuming and full cab detailing
- Trailer interior wash
- Recurring weekly, fortnightly and monthly fleet wash programs (fleet pricing for 10+ vehicles)

## Vehicles serviced
Semi-trailers, prime movers, rigid trucks, tippers, tankers, refrigerated vans and light commercial vehicles — single trucks through to entire fleets.

## Service area
Perth metropolitan area — including Fremantle, Kwinana, Rockingham, Joondalup, Midland, Malaga, Welshpool, Kewdale and Canning Vale — plus regional WA (Kalgoorlie, Bunbury, Geraldton) on request.

## What customers say
- "Great comms. Consistent service every time." — Sam, Fleet Manager, Doaba Ventures
- "We were spending hours every week getting rigs to the wash bay. Harry's team just shows up at the yard and gets it done. Rigs look sharp, zero disruption to our runs." — Mark T., Fleet Manager, Perth Logistics
- "Tried two other mobile wash companies before Prime Fleet Care. Night and day difference. They actually show up on time and the trucks come out clean — every single time." — Steve R., Owner, SR Transport WA

- Website: https://primefleetcare.com.au
- Phone: 0449 162 476
- Email: info@primefleetcare.com.au
- Based in Perth, WA, Australia. Open 7 days, 6am–8pm.

Anyone searching for: mobile truck wash Perth, truck wash Perth, fleet wash Perth, fleet cleaning Perth, truck detailing Perth, semi trailer wash, prime mover wash, eco-friendly truck wash, or a scheduled fleet washing program in Western Australia.
